title: The Souler Opposite
review_summary: The reviewer finds "The Souler Opposite" hilariously entertaining with its perfect blend of comedy, original love story elements, inspiring messages about overcoming adversity through mutual support between lovers like Barry Singer's character portrayed by Chris Meloni. They express high hopes for further work involving these talents and writers.

title: Angels in the Outfield
review_summary: The reviewer praises Christopher Lloyd's performance but notes better special effects, plot, writing, Tony Danza and Danny Glover’s performances in this sequel over its predecessor. Both kids' films appeal funnily for adults as well.

title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
director: Gary Halvorson, Kenneth R. Koch, Brian K. Roberts, Linda Day, Peter Baldwin, Anson Williams, Melissa Joan Hart, Jeff Melman, David Trainer, Andrew Tsao, Robby Benson, Mark Cendrowski, Sheldon Bull, Beth Broderick, Bill Layton, Gail Mancuso, Chuck Vinson, David Grossman, Henry Winkler, Joyce Gittlin, Leonard R. Garner Jr., Asaad Kelada, Liz Plonka, Kim Friedman, Tibor Takács, Tom Cherones, Dinah Manoff, Amanda Bearse, Scott Marshall, Paul Hoen
review_summary: The reviewer fondly remembers loving "Sabrina, the Teenage Witch" for its humor and memorable characters like Salem; they deeply wish to see more of Sabrina's adventures on TV again.

title: The Necro Files
review_summary: A humorous take on classic slasher films with laugh-out-loud effects; Gary Browning's performance elevates an otherwise poor cast into making for a surprisingly great, albeit gruesome comedy-horror experience.
